title: More Nonsense Limerick 63
content:
There was an old person of Barnes,
    Whose garments were covered with darns;
    But they said, "Without doubt, 
    You will soon wear them out,
    You luminous person of Barnes!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 63", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
